arts.ttl: ‘Supremely confident’- Alex Neil evaluates Ra’ees Bangura-Williams’ start to life in Millwall’s first team
arts.sum: “He wasn’t best pleased with himself at half-time,” revealed Neil after the win at Kenilworth Road. Millwall boss Alex Neil has praised the impact that Ra’ees Bangura-Williams has had since his first-team breakthrough.

arts.sum: John Mousinho has been spelling out exactly why Hayden Matthews has been high on their wanted list for the past six months.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Portsmouth seal £1.2m transfer window swoop to end long-running pursuit of highly-rated central defender
arts.sum: Pompey have completed the signing of Hayden Matthews in a £1.2m deal.

arts.ttl: Alex Neil pleased with winter signing’s Millwall debut in Luton win
arts.sum: “He’s played there [at right back] for Brentford, probably more for the B team in pre-season. It all meant that Crama’s debut as a Millwall player came at right-back rather than his natural position as a centre-back – but he had a solid afternoon at Kenilworth Road in that position against a tricky customer in Alfie Doughty.

arts.ttl: Portsmouth boss absolves Nicolas Schmid of blame after West Brom shocker - and points the finger elsewhere
arts.sum: Nicolas Schmid has been absolved of blame for Pompey’s abject West Brom capitulation.

arts.sum: Thomas Waddingham has set an immediate target of goals and playing time after hitting the ground running in English football.
